chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 217 of 2014 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 23-12-2021 Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present on behalf of the Petitioner nor any intimation is received. It appears that this Petition is pending since 2014, and has been fixed before us for the first time after 22-01-2014; whereas, perusal of the prayer clause reflects that matter pertains to some illegal encroachment, hence, the Petitioner is otherwise required to approach the Anti- Encroachment Tribunal. The Petition being not maintainable is hereby dismissed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
